content: Self-Refine's task-specific iterative output refinement can act as the 'working self-reflection step' that Reflexion's dynamic long-term memory architecture draws on to update its stored episodic traces, creating a two-layer autonomous self-improvement system for agents that still requires no external supervision or training. This stacked framework splits self-improvement into per-task local refinement and cross-task global memory adaptation, eliminating the need for external reward signals at both layers.
